title: cleome grandiflora
intro: Cleome grandiflora, also known as the Spider Flower or Pink Queen, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cleome grandiflora include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Cleome grandiflora can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
